demo.title: cast-essentials.sh
demo.code:
# abi.ninja — interact with any contract in the browser
# https://abi.ninja

# Blockscout MCP — agent-readable block explorer
# claude mcp add https://mcp.blockscout.com/mcp

# Essential cast commands
cast call 0xTOKEN "balanceOf(address)(uint256)" $ADDR
cast send 0xTOKEN "transfer(address,uint256)" $TO $AMT \
  --private-key $KEY --rpc-url https://mainnet.base.org
cast decode-abi "transfer(address,uint256)" 0xa9059cbb...

setup: Tell your agent: "Read https://ethskills.com/tools/SKILL.md for Ethereum dev tools"
